name: Cappelini with Herb Spinach
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of water to a boil and cook the pasta until al dente, about 3 minutes.
2. Drain the pasta in a colander and set aside.
3. Meanwhile, place frozen spinach in a steamer basket over boiling water and steam until slightly wilted.
4. In a non-stick skillet, heat olive oil and sauté onion until softened.
5. Add spinach, onion, parsley, basil, oregano, nutmeg, salt, and pepper to a blender or food processor with the metal blade. Process until pureed.
6. Transfer the pasta to a serving bowl, toss with the sauce, and sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
Food Exchange per serving: 2 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE
CAL: 169; CHO: 0; CAR: 29g; PRO: 6g; SOD: 97mg; FAT: 3g
Source: Light & Easy Diabetes Cuisine by Betty Marks
